ip_safety: Use ARPG open-world readability patterns only; do not copy proprietary Diablo IV layouts, names, icons, dungeon shapes, or world map art.

region_rules: Each region contains a hub/safe node, fast travel node, main quest POI chain, side POI loops, world events, stronghold-like hostile zone, and 3-6 dungeon entrances.
Dungeon entrances are visible map goals but must connect to separate procedural dungeon seeds.
Roads and neon transit lines create main routes; alleys, rooftops, tunnels, and hardlight bridges create optional loops.

dungeon_rules: Every dungeon has entrance, critical path, branches, event rooms, objective room, boss/exit room, and reward room.
Dungeons inherit theme and enemy table from their overworld entrance region.
Dungeon map must read clearly from top-down camera with strong silhouettes and neon edge cues.
